---
name: Report a Correction
about: Report an error or outdated information in an existing check
title: "[CORRECTION] "
labels: correction
assignees: ''
---

## Check ID or Section

Which check or section contains the error? (e.g., F-P01-042 or Section 5)

## Current Content

What does the check currently say?

## Proposed Correction

What should it say instead?

## Justification

Why is the current content incorrect or outdated? Include links to documentation if applicable.
